• Where the results remain within nontherapeutic ranges, there must be 
specific documentation of the factors that indicate why continued 
monitoring is reasonable and necessary. 

EXAMPLE: A patient with coronary artery disease was hospitalized with atrial 
fibrillation and subsequently discharged to the HHA with orders for anticoagulation 
therapy as well as other skilled nursing care. If indicated, monthly venipuncture to report 
prothrombin (protime) levels to the physician or allowed
